statements.sql: Connection Established
select * from `users` where `id` = 1 limit 1

select column_name as `name`, data_type as `type_name`, column_type as `type`, collation_name as `collation`, is_nullable as `nullable`, column_default as `default`, column_comment as `comment`, extra as `extra` from information_schema.columns where table_schema = 'sigap_air' and table_name = 'petugas' order by ordinal_position asc
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan`
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where `status` = 'menunggu_verifikasi'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where `status` in ('disetujui', 'ditugaskan', 'diproses', 'sedang_diproses')
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where `status` = 'selesai'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where exists (select * from `sla_pengaduan` where `pengaduan`.`id` = `sla_pengaduan`.`pengaduan_id` and `status_sla` = 'overdue')
select count(*) as aggregate from `petugas` where `status_tersedia` = 'tersedia'
select `kategori_id`, count(*) as total from `pengaduan` group by `kategori_id`
select `id`, `nama_kategori` from `kategori_pengaduan` where `kategori_pengaduan`.`id` in (1, 2, 3)
select `zona_id`, count(*) as total from `pengaduan` group by `zona_id`
select `id`, `nama_zona` from `zona_wilayah` where `zona_wilayah`.`id` in (1, 3)
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2025 and month(`created_at`) = '07'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2025 and month(`created_at`) = '08'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2025 and month(`created_at`) = '09'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2025 and month(`created_at`) = '10'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2025 and month(`created_at`) = '11'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2025 and month(`created_at`) = '12'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and month(`created_at`) = '01'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and month(`created_at`) = '02'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and month(`created_at`) = '03'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and month(`created_at`) = '04'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and month(`created_at`) = '05'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where year(`created_at`) = 2026 and month(`created_at`) = '06'
select count(*) as aggregate from `users`
select `role`, count(*) as total from `users` group by `role`
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where date(`created_at`) = '2026-06-07'
select count(*) as aggregate from `pengaduan` where month(`created_at`) = '06'
select * from `pengaduan` order by `created_at` desc limit 8
select * from `users` where `users`.`id` in (4, 5, 6)
select * from `kategori_pengaduan` where `kategori_pengaduan`.`id` in (1, 2, 3)
select * from `zona_wilayah` where `zona_wilayah`.`id` in (1, 3)
